articles.title_en: Missile strike on Belgorod, fire near Smolensk, 155 UAVs target Russia: new attack
articles.lead_en: A woman was killed and another was injured after a Ukrainian munition struck the city of Belgorod
articles.title_raw: Missile strike on Belgorod, fire near Smolensk, 155 UAVs target Russia: new attack
articles.lead_raw: A woman was killed and another was injured after a Ukrainian munition struck the city of Belgorod

articles.title_en: Death toll from Russian strike on Kyiv rises to 30
articles.lead_en: Rescuers in Kyiv pulled three more bodies from the rubble of a residential building destroyed in a Russian strike on July 2, the State Emergency Service of Ukraine reported, bringing the death toll to 30.
articles.title_raw: Death toll from Russian strike on Kyiv rises to 30
articles.lead_raw: Rescuers in Kyiv pulled three more bodies from the rubble of a residential building destroyed in a Russian strike on July 2, the State Emergency Service of Ukraine reported, bringing the death toll to 30.

articles.title_en: Ukraine launches missile strike on Belgorod, killing one woman and causing power and water outages
articles.lead_en: Ukrainian launched a missile strike on Russia’s Belgorod and the surrounding district on the morning of July 3, the regional emergency operations center reported.
articles.title_raw: Ukraine launches missile strike on Belgorod, killing one woman and causing power and water outages
articles.lead_raw: Ukrainian launched a missile strike on Russia’s Belgorod and the surrounding district on the morning of July 3, the regional emergency operations center reported.

articles.title_en: See the aftermath of one of Russia’s largest attacks on Kyiv. Apartment buildings lie in ruins, at least 18 people were killed, and dozens were injured.
articles.lead_en: Russian forces attacked Kyiv overnight on July 2 with drones, ballistic missiles, and cruise missiles. Kyiv Mayor Vitali Klitschko said the strike on the Ukrainian capital was the most massive since the start of the full-scale war.
